title: AA-MBVD
description: A mod to add Ace Attorney to Minecraft!
body:
**This Mod is Under development!
So it may cause some bugs or problems.
You should tell me these things.**

This mod has added 2 **Badges** from Ace Attorney and a new silver ore to craft these **Badges**.

![Two Badge on the wall.One of them is AttorneysBadge, And the other one is Prosbadge.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/806d036a16696ad2aef950aa8becbf8bf4931ff4.png)

And there is the silver ore and its generation:

![A silver nugget, a silver ingot and a silver block in the item_farme on the wall. And a silver ore block and a silver block both on the ground. They're white.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42eeae4f82aa71dfc679168c7f69f191d1c94f9e.png)

![The generation of the silver ores.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0a66677e65b659e08d2ba812e69fb4c43620fba.png)

The mod has also added a function that you can **show your Evidence** by pressing **V** by default. If you show some special Evidence, It maybe causes something interesting.**(This function is also under development!!!It is NOT Perfect!!!)**

There is how the evidence showing (It has an animation.)
![Showing Evidence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7b7c54ac03893bd883039a9d9c0da33a514c4ff.png)

And you can also have some silly HUDs when you wear a Badge like following ones:
(The HUDs has some languages to use ramdomly)

**Objection**
![When Show Objection by Pressing 'O' by Default in English](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f94d7011c5fdd260bf28db7a6f2df4cd0856ab7e.png)
**Take that**
![When Show Takethat by Pressing 'Tab' by Default in English](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52f162d3b2546bffb8028463af2bba105ecde4cc.png)
**Hold it**
![When Show Holdit by Pressing 'H' by Default in Chinese](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40858790f016ba8987486eb4f33d4ce7af0b4b02.png)

And I made a Photo Showing Function(It has sound tips!):
![Salute to the legendary fire extinguisher killer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6259710c49441e136098f3abd703d4bf51c65e14.png)

Some Items or Blocks I have made now(There's also an enchanted book, but I'm too lazy to show it :) ):
![Some Items and Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6ad8087d587c1ed7861dfa2bb62f193578a68e9_0.webp)
